wikitext.*:
===={{B2W2}}====
Whitney uses three of these Pokémon in [[Pokémon battle|Single Battles]], four in [[Double Battle|Double]] and [[Rotation Battle]]s, and all six in [[Triple Battle]]s. Whitney will always lead with her signature Pokémon, {{p|Miltank}}.

=====[[Johto Leaders Tournament]]=====
